PAELCHARACTER-SLEEP.description: Add [gold]Dormant[/gold] to a card. [gold]Dormant[/gold] cards cannot be played and stay in your [gold]Hand[/gold] until they wake up next turn.
PAELCHARACTER-SLEEP.title: Sleep
PAELCHARACTER-WAX.title: Wax
PAELCHARACTER-WAX.description: When a [gold]Waxed[/gold] card is played or exhausted, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold], then remove [gold]Waxed[/gold].
PAELCHARACTER-WAKE.title: Wake
PAELCHARACTER-WAKE.description: Whenever a card loses the [gold]Dormant[/gold] modifier, it wakes up.
